headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://maps.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://maps.gstatic.com https://maps.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://maps.googleapis.com; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; object-src 'none'
